relationships.context: Vrijen is the owner of Careerspan, responsible for configuring the funnel
V receives JD and voice note from Alan and delivers the application link back
V creates a group chat and introduces Shivam / Corridor X

Skills breakdown feeds question flow and scoring dimensions in the assessment
Candidates use the link to access and complete the self-reflection exercise
